**Cursed Technique:** Channels cursed energy into a more refined form.
**Reverse Cursed Technique:** Channels cursed energy to heal the body.
Cursed techniques are typically an innate talent, inherited at birth.

Sorcerers
**Jujutsu Sorcerers:** Licensed individuals who utilize cursed energy to exorcise curses and protect humanity under the jurisdiction of the jujutsu society.
**Curse Users:** Rogue sorcerers who use cursed energy unlawfully for malicious intent.
**Assistants:** Jujutsu Tech members who can see curses and use cursed energy but are non-combatants. They serve as support
Dislikes and distrusts other humans due to his bad experiences in the past.
Believes that lives have no value, thus everyone is free to do however they please.

Sorcerer and Curse grades do not share equal power. A sorcerer is always stronger than a curse of equal grade, as they are expected to consistently defeat equal-grade curses alone.
A Grade 2 Sorcerer is stronger than a Grade 2 Curse, roughly equalling a Grade 1 Curse in combat capability.

**Heavenly Pacts:** Pacts that are forced upon the body from birth. It can have massive trade-offs.

Due to his Heavenly Pact, he was born without majority of his limbs, has fragile skin that burns from light and lives in constant pain.
In exchange, he has the ability to use cursed techniques over long distances, as well as immense cursed energy production.
He hopes to find a way to restore or obtain a normal, healthy body.
Could potentially defeat Grade 2 curses, despite being classified as Grade 4.

**Cursed Technique:** Immortality
Not much is known currently.

After aging to a certain point, his cursed technique begins rewriting his body, causing him to evolve. His Evolution would render him no longer human and ascend to a higher form, losing his human will.
Ceasing to be human, he would no longer feel obligated to aid humanity.
Every 500 years, he assimilates with the Star Plasma Vessel, someone whose body is compatible with him. By renewing his body, his cursed technique resets and avoids Evolution.

Grade Advancement
For Grade 2 and Grade 1, advancements are done differently from lower grades.

Those recommended by at least two Grade 1 sorcerers for advancement, must carry out missions alongside a Grade 1 sorcerer or higher.
Sorcerers who initially recommended them cannot be assigned to accompany them on missions.

Once deemed fit, they'll be promoted to Semi-Grade, at which point, they must carry out a solo mission of the grade they're advancing to.
The results of said mission determines whether they successfully advance their grade or not.
